rules.title: Hermes OpenClaw migration artifact detected
rules.why_it_matters: OpenClaw migration can import skills, settings, memories or credentials into a Hermes environment.
recommended_actions: Remove migrated artifacts that are no longer needed.
recommended_alternatives: Import only selected skills instead of full environment migration.
rules.migration_instruction: Review ~/.hermes/skills/openclaw-imports and remove unused imported skills.

rules.title: Hermes gateway or remote trigger detected
rules.why_it_matters: Gateway configuration can allow remote systems or users to trigger agent behavior.
recommended_alternatives: Use local CLI-only mode for sensitive workspaces.
rules.migration_instruction: Disable remote gateways until allowed users and token storage are reviewed.
